item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Childcare Disaster Recovery Fund
item.description:
👀 Childcare Disaster Recovery

Childcare disaster recovery fund 119th Congress: post-disaster childcare-provider stabilization · FEMA-coordinated provisions. Composes with Climate Disaster Resilience + Universal Pre-K + #4 Concierge. 🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
